visual.name: sdmpbigradientheatmap
visual.description: Gradient Heatmap with smooth interpolation between sparse XY data points for Power BI.

fr-FR.Prop_RbfBandwidth: Largeur de bande RBF (% du tracé)
fr-FR.Prop_SpUseHeatmapColor: Utiliser la couleur de la heatmap
fr-FR.Prop_ClLeaderLineTransparency: Transparence de la ligne de repère

it-IT.Prop_RbfBandwidth: Larghezza di banda RBF (% del grafico)

pt-BR.Prop_RbfBandwidth: Largura de banda RBF (% do gráfico)
pt-BR.Prop_SpUseHeatmapColor: Usar cor do mapa de calor

ro-RO.Prop_RbfBandwidth: Lățime de bandă RBF (% din grafic)
